Internal lockdowns are manually triggered “ ﬁ!‘ﬁg“‘ﬁ: N
events that lock one or all of the sectors %’)‘% &Q}d’
by restricting use of the Sector Elevator, ‘osh = S
effectively locking staff in their sector until
the emergency is handled. They can only be lifted via the
Directorial Override in Maintenance once the Director is satisfied
that the situation is under control.
External lockdowns are a bigger deal. Nothing in or out of the
whole building. It's only triggered by a code red containment
breach, based on some complicated system that security and
research slapped together. It can only be lifted once A) the threat
has been neutralized and B) a high clearance individual gives the
system the all clear. This process is NOT the same as the
Directorial Override, so stop saying so in documentation!
| know it's confusing as hell. I've told Darling a hundred times to
change it, but they're adamant it stays the way it is. Honestly | don’t
think they even know how to change it at this point. Let’s just make
sure our staff understand how this mess all works, OK?
- Marshall
